title: Version not bumped for unreleased v1.2.0 feature set
evidence: pyproject.toml:7 & vistab.py:93 = 1.1.3; CHANGELOG [Unreleased] + TODO.md say Colspan Completed in v1.2.0
impact: Release ships as 1.1.3 while containing a feature-level (colspan/CLI subcommands) changeset; users cannot pin the new features by version
recommended_action: Bump version to 1.2.0 and move CHANGELOG [Unreleased] to [1.2.0] as a release prerequisite

title: Extensive LSP/type-hint inaccuracies in src/vistab.py
evidence: ~100+ pyright/LSP errors: draw()->Optional[str] used where str expected, wcwidth param-name mismatch, Optional bool defaults
impact: Runtime-harmless (101 tests pass) but noisy for contributors using type-aware editors
recommended_action: Assess in S2; targeted hint corrections only if low-risk
